heroDesc: Casting service for complex metal blanks and production structures
bodyTitle: Metal Casting Service from casting plan to post-machined delivery
bodyDesc: Metal casting is suitable for complex outer geometry, internal cavities and volume metal blanks, often combined with CNC finishing, heat treatment and surface finishing. Review focuses on alloy grade, wall thickness, draft, shrinkage allowance, post-machining of holes and defect inspection requirements.

panels.title: Process Match
panels.subtitle: By Volume and Geometry
panels.body: Sand, gravity or die casting routes depend on volume and size.

panels.title: Dimension Control
panels.subtitle: Machining Allowance
panels.body: Mounting holes, sealing faces and datums usually need post-machining.

panels.title: Quality Focus
panels.subtitle: Shrinkage / Porosity
panels.body: Critical load-bearing parts need clear inspection criteria.

tableRows: Sand, gravity, die casting and more
Selected by volume, size and material
Wall, radius, draft, gating and risers
Sharp corners and abrupt thickness changes may cause defects
CNC finishing, drilling, tapping, sealing faces

steps.title: Casting feasibility review
steps.body: Confirm material, size, wall thickness, volume and machined faces.

steps.title: Tooling or mold plan
steps.body: Define parting, gating, risers and shrinkage allowance.

steps.title: Casting and cleaning
steps.body: Pour, cool, shake out, cut risers and clean.

steps.title: Post-machining and inspection
steps.body: Machine critical faces and complete dimensional, visual or agreed inspections.

asideCta.title: Submit Requirements
asideCta.body: Upload drawings and project goals so engineers can review the service route.

related.title: Related Service Combinations
related.desc: Complex projects often combine multiple services. Review by geometry, volume, material and delivery goals.

items.title: CNC Machining Service
items.body: Milling, turning, mill-turn and hole-pattern machining for metal and engineering plastic parts.

items.title: Molding Service
items.body: Injection molding, tool trials, low-volume molding and design optimization for plastic parts.

items.title: Custom Manufacturing Service
items.body: Coordinates CNC, sheet metal, finishing, purchased parts and assembly for complex projects.

faq.title: Metal Casting Service FAQ
faq.desc: These answers help clarify fit, input files and quotation review before submitting a manufacturing request.

items.q: What projects is Metal Casting Service suitable for?
items.a: Metal Casting Service is suitable for projects that need manufacturing review based on drawings, material, quantity, tolerances and delivery goals, especially prototypes, low-volume parts and functional components.

items.q: What information is needed for a Metal Casting Service quote?
items.a: Prepare 3D files, 2D drawings when tolerances matter, material grade, quantity, finish requirements, inspection needs and target delivery timing so engineers can evaluate the route accurately.

items.q: How are lead time and cost confirmed for Metal Casting Service?
items.a: Lead time and cost are confirmed after reviewing geometry, material, process route, finishing, inspection scope and order quantity. Complex tolerances or special finishes may require engineering confirmation.

ctaDesc: Share drawings and requirements — our engineers will recommend a stable process route.
